title: Awaken, Demon Hunter of Little Red Riding Hood
overview: Alicia tries to summon strong fighters to gain an edge in the next queen's blade, and ends up a stranger fairy tale land.

title: Round Dance, The Dreaming Mermaid Princess
overview: Still trying to make it home, Alicia catches a young woman named Kyuel in one of her beach traps. Tiina, from the seabed kingdom, is visiting an abandoned ship and looks at a picture with humans dancing, and laments that she can't dance like them. She wishes for human legs.
